subtopics: Conservation of charge, Coulomb's law, superposition principle, continuous charge distribution
key_concepts: Electric field and lines, Electric dipole and torque, Gauss's theorem applications (wire, plane sheet, spherical shell)

subtopics: Electric potential, equipotential surfaces, electrical potential energy
key_concepts: Conductors and insulators, Dielectrics and polarization, Capacitors (series/parallel), Parallel plate capacitor with dielectric, Energy stored in a capacitor

Ohm's law and V-I characteristics, Electrical energy/power/resistivity/conductivity, Temperature dependence of resistance, Internal resistance of a cell, Combination of cells, Kirchhoff's rules, Wheatstone bridge

subtopics: Concept of magnetic field, Oersted's experiment
key_concepts: Biot-Savart law (circular loop), Ampere's law (straight wire and solenoid), Force on moving charge/conductor, Torque on current loop, Current loop as dipole, Moving coil galvanometer

subtopics: Bar magnet as equivalent solenoid, Magnetic field intensity of dipole
key_concepts: Torque on magnetic dipole, Magnetic properties (para-, dia-, ferro-magnetic), Magnetization and effect of temperature
Faraday's laws, Lenz's Law, Self and mutual induction

subtopics: Peak and RMS values, Reactance and impedance
key_concepts: LCR series circuit (phasors), Resonance, Power in AC circuits, Wattless current, AC generator, Transformer
Displacement current, Characteristics and transverse nature of EM waves, Electromagnetic spectrum (radio to gamma rays) and uses

subtopics: Reflection, Spherical mirrors (formula), Refraction at spherical surfaces
key_concepts: Total internal reflection and optical fibers, Lenses (thin lens formula, maker's formula, magnification, power), Combination of lenses, Prism refraction, Optical instruments (Microscopes, Telescopes)

subtopics: Huygen's principle, Reflection and refraction of plane waves
key_concepts: Interference (Young's double slit), Coherent sources, Diffraction due to single slit

chapters.source_chapter_name: Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter
key_concepts: Photoelectric effect (Hertz, Lenard, Einstein's equation), Particle nature of light, Matter waves (de-Broglie relation)
Alpha-particle scattering, Rutherford's model, Bohr model (radius, velocity, energy), Hydrogen line spectra
Composition and size of nucleus, Nuclear force, Mass-energy relation, Binding energy per nucleon, Nuclear fission and fusion

chapters.source_chapter_name: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits
key_concepts: Energy bands (conductors, semiconductors, insulators), Intrinsic and extrinsic (p/n type) semiconductors, p-n junction diode I-V characteristics, Diode as rectifier
